heading: Purposes
label: 170503 Purposes
text: The purposes of the corporation are as provided in its articles of incorporation. The corporation shall function as a veterans’ and patriotic organization as authorized by the laws of each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)17050336:2503., , .July 23, 1984Pub. L. 98–372, § 398 Stat. 1239The word “objects” is omitted as unnecessary.
